title: oldenlandia coronata
intro: Oldenlandia coronata, also known as Golden Glory or Swamp Mallow, is a perennial herb native to Asia, characterized by its yellow flowers and heart-shaped leaves. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Oldenlandia coronata include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
